The 99% of the putters, the positive loft to get it off the grid, but its back's getting completely unimpact and then it bounces while its back's spinning and the bouncing and the friction to get it to move to overspin and the positive to get it to side spin and offline and off distance and all of their inaccuracy things. The other kind of putters are top spin putters, but they hit the ball with a negative loft so it goes down into the ground and still bounces and still gets all offline.
